sentences.sentence: It is one of the world's most popular games, played by millions of people at home, in clubs, online, by correspondence, and in tournaments.
sentences.translation: 它是世界上最受欢迎的游戏之一，数百万人在家中、俱乐部、网上、通信中和锦标赛里参与这项游戏。

structure.text: It is one of the world's most popular games
played by millions of people at home, in clubs, online, by correspondence, and in tournaments

difficult_points: It 暂未点明具体所指，下一句才揭示是 chess。
played by... 是过去分词短语修饰 games，后面并列五种参与场景。

expressions.text: one of the world's most popular
expressions.meaning_zh: 世界上最受欢迎的……之一

sentences.sentence: It is chess, a humble arrangement where two players stare at a checkered board with 64 squares arranged in an eight-by-eight grid, eyeing their 16 pieces each as the first move is played.
sentences.translation: 它就是国际象棋：一种看似朴素的对弈，两名棋手凝视着由64个方格组成的八乘八棋盘，在第一步棋落下时各自审视自己的16枚棋子。

structure.text: It is chess, a humble arrangement
where two players stare at a checkered board with 64 squares arranged in an eight-by-eight grid
eyeing their 16 pieces each as the first move is played

difficult_points: a humble arrangement 与 chess 同位，where 从句说明这种布局中的场景。
arranged... 修饰 squares；eyeing... 的逻辑主语是 two players。
as 引导时间从句，is played 是被动语态。

sentences.sentence: When the opponent's king is checkmated, the game is over, but between the beginning and the end, a wealth of elegant, complicated, and fascinating moves and combinations can unfold.
sentences.translation: 当对手的王被将死时，棋局便结束了；但从开局到终局之间，可以展开无数优雅、复杂且迷人的走法与组合。

structure.text: When the opponent's king is checkmated
the game is over
but between the beginning and the end, a wealth of elegant, complicated, and fascinating moves and combinations can unfold

difficult_points: is checkmated 是被动语态，指王被将死。
a wealth of 表示大量，unfold 描写棋局中的走法逐步展开。

sentences.sentence: The origins of chess lie in Northwest India, around the 6th century.
sentences.translation: 国际象棋起源于约公元6世纪的印度西北部。

structure.text: The origins of chess
lie in Northwest India, around the 6th century

difficult_points: lie in 在此表示起源或存在于某地，不是“说谎”。
around the 6th century 同时给出近似年代。

sentences.sentence: At that time there existed a game known as caturanga, which means 'four division', those divisions being of the military, represented by the infantry, cavalry, elephants, and chariotry.
sentences.translation: 当时有一种名为“恰图兰卡”的游戏，其名称意为“四个兵种”；这四部分属于军队体系，分别由步兵、骑兵、象兵和战车兵代表。

structure.text: there existed a game known as caturanga
which means 'four division'
those divisions being of the military, represented by the infantry, cavalry, elephants, and chariotry

difficult_points: known as... 修饰 game，which 指 caturanga 这一名称。
those divisions being... 是独立主格；represented by... 补充四个兵种。
原文 four division 中 division 应为复数，但需原样保留。

sentences.sentence: These pieces were aventually to become the pawn, knight, bishop, and rook, respectively, in the modern descendant of the game.
sentences.translation: 在这一游戏的现代后继形式中，这些棋子最终分别演变成兵、马、象和车。

structure.text: These pieces
were aventually to become the pawn, knight, bishop, and rook, respectively, in the modern descendant of the game

difficult_points: were to become 表示后来注定或最终演变为某物。
respectively 表明四种旧兵种与四种现代棋子按顺序对应；aventually 是原文拼写错误。

sentences.sentence: Around 600 AD, caturanga spread to Persia, then, after the Muslim conquest of that region (beginning around that time), the game gained ground throughout the Islamic world, from where it eventually spread to Europe.
sentences.translation: 约公元600年，恰图兰卡传入波斯；随后在穆斯林征服该地区后（征服大致始于同一时期），这种游戏遍及伊斯兰世界，并最终从那里传到欧洲。

structure.text: caturanga spread to Persia
after the Muslim conquest of that region (beginning around that time), the game gained ground throughout the Islamic world
from where it eventually spread to Europe

difficult_points: 两个独立分句由逗号和 then 松散连接；beginning... 修饰 conquest。
from where 指从 Islamic world，gain ground 表示逐渐传播并获得影响。

sentences.sentence: Around 1200 AD, Southern Europe began modifying the rules, and within 300 years the game had become recognisably the one we play today.
sentences.translation: 约公元1200年，南欧开始修改规则；在此后的300年内，这项游戏已经明显演变成我们今天所玩的样子。

structure.text: Southern Europe began modifying the rules
and within 300 years the game had become recognisably the one we play today

difficult_points: begin 后接动名词 modifying；had become 表示在后来某一历史节点前已完成变化。
the one 后省略关系代词 that，we play today 修饰 one。

sentences.sentence: The queen had long replaced the earlier vizier to become the most powerful piece, while the pawns were given the option of advancing two squares on the first move in order to accelerate play.
sentences.translation: 王后早已取代原来的维齐尔，成为威力最大的棋子；与此同时，兵获得了首次移动两格的选择，以加快棋局节奏。

structure.text: The queen had long replaced the earlier vizier to become the most powerful piece
while the pawns were given the option of advancing two squares on the first move in order to accelerate play

difficult_points: to become... 表示取代之后形成的结果。
were given 是被动语态，of advancing... 修饰 option；in order to... 表目的。

sentences.sentence: These new rules quickly spread across Western Europe, creating the game now known as 'western chess' or 'international chess', to distinguish it from older or regional variants of the game.
sentences.translation: 这些新规则迅速传遍西欧，形成了如今称为“西洋棋”或“国际象棋”的游戏，以区别于更古老或地区性的变体。

structure.text: These new rules quickly spread across Western Europe
creating the game now known as 'western chess' or 'international chess'
to distinguish it from older or regional variants of the game

difficult_points: creating... 是现在分词结果状语，now known as... 修饰 game。
to distinguish... 说明命名的目的，it 指该现代棋类形式。

sentences.sentence: As for the players themselves, one world think that the best of them are necessarily smart, with extremely high IQs; however, research has not been able to confirm this link.
sentences.translation: 至于棋手本身，人们或许会认为顶尖棋手必然聪明、智商极高；然而，研究尚未证实这种联系。

structure.text: As for the players themselves
one world think that the best of them are necessarily smart, with extremely high IQs
however, research has not been able to confirm this link

difficult_points: that 从句作 think 的宾语，with... 补充说明 smart。
分号后 however 引出研究结果的转折；原文 world 应为 would，是拼写错误。

sentences.sentence: Some studies have shown that good chess players may have strong IQs, but there appears to be no direct correlation between this and chess ability.
sentences.translation: 一些研究显示，优秀棋手的智商可能较高，但这种智商与棋艺之间似乎没有直接相关性。

structure.text: Some studies have shown that good chess players may have strong IQs
but there appears to be no direct correlation between this and chess ability

difficult_points: shown 后的 that 从句说明研究结果。
there appears to be 是存在句，this 回指前述较高智商。

sentences.sentence: Paradoxically, the academically brilliant may even be less able at chess, and vice versa.
sentences.translation: 矛盾的是，学业上极其出色的人在国际象棋方面甚至可能较弱，反之亦然。

structure.text: Paradoxically
the academically brilliant may even be less able at chess
and vice versa

difficult_points: the academically brilliant 是“the + 形容词”名词化，指学业优秀者。
vice versa 表示反向情况同样成立，即棋艺高者未必学业突出。

sentences.sentence: Evidently, there are other factors involved, such as spacio-visual insight and subliminal memory, not necessarily picked up by conventional intelligence tests, readily noticeable, or even useful in real life.
sentences.translation: 显然，还有其他因素参与其中，例如空间视觉洞察力和潜意识记忆；这些能力未必能被传统智力测试测出，也未必容易察觉，甚至在现实生活中未必有用。

structure.text: there are other factors involved
such as spacio-visual insight and subliminal memory
not necessarily picked up by conventional intelligence tests, readily noticeable, or even useful in real life

difficult_points: involved 是过去分词修饰 factors；such as 列举两项因素。
not necessarily 同时约束 picked up、noticeable 和 useful 三项并列描述。
spacio-visual 是源文非常规拼写，语意为 spatial-visual。

sentences.sentence: But there are non-mental factors which clearly play a role.
sentences.translation: 但也有一些非智力因素显然会发挥作用。

structure.text: there are non-mental factors
which clearly play a role

difficult_points: there are 引出另一类因素，which 修饰 factors。
play a role 表示对棋艺发展产生影响。

sentences.sentence: No one can doubt that raw talent is necessary, but even the best and brightest must systematically undergo at least 10 to 15 years of theoretical study and competitive practice before reaching world championship levels.
sentences.translation: 没有人会怀疑天赋不可或缺，但即使最优秀、最聪明的人，也必须系统接受至少10至15年的理论学习和竞赛实践，才能达到世界冠军水平。

structure.text: No one can doubt that raw talent is necessary
but even the best and brightest must systematically undergo at least 10 to 15 years of theoretical study and competitive practice
before reaching world championship levels

difficult_points: the best and brightest 是名词化形容词，泛指最优秀聪明的人。
before reaching... 省略主语 they，强调达到冠军水平前的长期训练。

sentences.sentence: The American chess genius, Bobby Fischer, was only 13 when he produced the 'Game of the Century', but he was not world champion until he was 29.
sentences.translation: 美国国际象棋天才鲍比·菲舍尔创下“世纪之战”时年仅13岁，但直到29岁才成为世界冠军。

structure.text: The American chess genius, Bobby Fischer, was only 13 when he produced the 'Game of the Century'
but he was not world champion until he was 29

difficult_points: Bobby Fischer 与 The American chess genius 构成同位关系。
not...until... 表示“直到……才……”，不能译作单纯否定。

sentences.sentence: The Russian chess player, Garry Kasparov, was the youngest world champion ever, at 22, but he began dedicated state-sponsored training from the age of ten onwards, complete with personal chess coaches.
sentences.translation: 俄罗斯棋手加里·卡斯帕罗夫22岁便成为史上最年轻的世界冠军，但他从10岁起就开始接受国家资助的专项训练，并配有私人国际象棋教练。

structure.text: The Russian chess player, Garry Kasparov, was the youngest world champion ever, at 22
but he began dedicated state-sponsored training from the age of ten onwards, complete with personal chess coaches

difficult_points: Garry Kasparov 是主语的同位语，at 22 补充夺冠年龄。
complete with... 是形容词短语补充说明训练配套条件。

sentences.sentence: All this shows the fixed place chess has in western culture, meaning also that this region has, historically, produced all the greatest players.
sentences.translation: 这一切说明国际象棋在西方文化中地位稳固，也意味着从历史上看，最伟大的棋手都出自这一地区。

structure.text: All this shows the fixed place chess has in western culture
meaning also that this region has, historically, produced all the greatest players

difficult_points: the fixed place 后省略关系词 that，chess has... 修饰 place。
meaning... 是现在分词结果状语，that 从句作 meaning 的内容。

sentences.sentence: However, interest in chess is now growing in the East, although there is one problem being the stiff competition it faces with local board games, such as Xiangqi and Go.
sentences.translation: 不过，东方对国际象棋的兴趣正在增长，尽管存在一个问题：它面临象棋和围棋等本地棋类游戏的激烈竞争。

structure.text: interest in chess is now growing in the East
although there is one problem being the stiff competition it faces with local board games, such as Xiangqi and Go

difficult_points: although 引导让步从句；being 用法生硬，语意是在解释 one problem。
competition 后省略关系词，it faces... 修饰 competition；it 指 chess。

sentences.sentence: These are more popular by a wide margin, but regarding China for example, with its huge population and state-sponsored training, it is fast becoming a major chess power.
sentences.translation: 这些本地棋类的受欢迎程度遥遥领先；但以中国为例，凭借庞大人口和国家资助的训练，它正迅速成为国际象棋强国。

structure.text: These are more popular by a wide margin
but regarding China for example, with its huge population and state-sponsored training, it is fast becoming a major chess power

difficult_points: These 指 Xiangqi and Go；by a wide margin 表示领先幅度很大。
regarding China 与 with... 是话题和背景成分，it 指 China。

sentences.sentence: The reigning women's world chess champion is Chinese, and the country performs well in chess Olympiads.
sentences.translation: 现任女子国际象棋世界冠军是中国人，而且中国在国际象棋奥林匹克团体赛中表现出色。

structure.text: The reigning women's world chess champion is Chinese
and the country performs well in chess Olympiads

difficult_points: reigning 表示目前在位、现任的冠军。
the country 回指 China，chess Olympiads 指国际象棋奥林匹克团体赛。

sentences.sentence: The future for the game in this country looks bright indeed.
sentences.translation: 这项运动在中国的前景确实十分光明。

structure.text: The future for the game in this country
looks bright indeed

difficult_points: this country 指 China，for the game 说明所谈前景的对象。
look bright 是系动词结构，比喻前景良好。

sentences.sentence: Talking about the future inevitably leads to the subject of computer chess.
sentences.translation: 谈到未来，就不可避免地会引出计算机国际象棋这一话题。

structure.text: Talking about the future
inevitably leads to the subject of computer chess

difficult_points: Talking about... 是动名词短语作主语。
lead to 在此表示话题自然转向，而不是物理上的带领。

sentences.sentence: Serious chess-playing machines began to emerge in the 1970s and 1980s, but their abilities were far below that of the top human players.
sentences.translation: 真正有实力的国际象棋机器在20世纪70至80年代开始出现，但它们的能力远低于顶尖人类棋手。

structure.text: Serious chess-playing machines began to emerge in the 1970s and 1980s
but their abilities were far below that of the top human players

difficult_points: begin to emerge 表示开始出现。
that 原意替代 ability，但前面 abilities 为复数，数上不一致，是源文问题。

sentences.sentence: Progress, although slow, was steady, and with increasing memory and faster processing, it was inevitable that one day a computer would be able to match humans.
sentences.translation: 进展虽然缓慢，却一直稳定；随着存储能力提升和处理速度加快，计算机终有一天能够与人类匹敌已是必然。

structure.text: Progress, although slow, was steady
and with increasing memory and faster processing, it was inevitable that one day a computer would be able to match humans

difficult_points: although slow 是省略 it was 的让步插入语。
第二分句 it 是形式主语，that 从句是真正主语。

sentences.sentence: Yet this is merely by brutally going through all the possible moves, millions per second, deeper and deeper into the position.
sentences.translation: 然而，机器只是靠蛮力穷举所有可能走法，每秒数百万步，并不断向更深层的局面搜索。

structure.text: this is merely by brutally going through all the possible moves
millions per second, deeper and deeper into the position

difficult_points: this 回指计算机与人类匹敌；by going through... 说明实现方式。
millions per second 是省略 moves 的速率表达，deeper... 描述搜索深度。

expressions.text: go through all the possible moves

sentences.sentence: The final move-choices give the appearance of intuition and long-term strategy, when in actual fact they are simply based on an unthinking and directionless material count.
sentences.translation: 最终选出的走法给人以直觉和长期战略的表象，但实际上它们只是建立在没有思考、没有方向的子力计算之上。

structure.text: The final move-choices give the appearance of intuition and long-term strategy
when in actual fact they are simply based on an unthinking and directionless material count

difficult_points: when 在此不是时间，而是带有“其实却”含义的对比连接。
they 指 move-choices；material count 是对棋盘子力价值的机械计算。

sentences.sentence: In 1989, the computer 'Deep Thought' scored some wins against top human players, although the world champion at that time, Garry Kasparov, easily defeated the machine in some arranged games.
sentences.translation: 1989年，计算机“深思”曾战胜一些顶尖人类棋手，尽管当时的世界冠军加里·卡斯帕罗夫在几场安排好的比赛中轻松击败了它。

structure.text: the computer 'Deep Thought' scored some wins against top human players
although the world champion at that time, Garry Kasparov, easily defeated the machine in some arranged games

difficult_points: although 引导让步，从机器胜绩转向其面对世界冠军时的失败。
Garry Kasparov 与 the world champion at that time 同位。

sentences.sentence: In 1996, however, IBM brought out the next generation computer, 'Deep Blue', Pitting it in s match with this same player.
sentences.translation: 然而，1996年IBM推出下一代计算机“深蓝”，让它与同一位棋手进行比赛。

structure.text: IBM brought out the next generation computer, 'Deep Blue'
Pitting it in s match with this same player

difficult_points: Deep Blue 与 the next generation computer 同位；Pitting... 是现在分词补充后续安排。
原文 Pitting 不应大写，in s match 中 s 应为 a，均按原文保留。

sentences.sentence: Although it managed to score the first win against a reigning world champion, by losing three and drawing two of the remaining games, it lost the match.
sentences.translation: 尽管它拿下了计算机对现任世界冠军的首场胜利，但由于其余比赛三负两平，最终输掉了整场对决。

structure.text: Although it managed to score the first win against a reigning world champion
by losing three and drawing two of the remaining games, it lost the match

difficult_points: Although 从句承认单局突破，主句说明整场比赛仍败北。
by losing... 从字面是方式状语，实际列举整场失利的比分构成。

sentences.sentence: However, a return match the following year saw Kasparov facing an even better machine, 'Deeper Blue'.
sentences.translation: 然而，次年的重赛中，卡斯帕罗夫面对的是一台更强的机器——“更深的蓝”。

structure.text: a return match the following year
saw Kasparov facing an even better machine, 'Deeper Blue'

difficult_points: 比赛作 see 的主语是拟人化表达，意为比赛中出现某种对阵。
facing... 是宾语补足语，Deeper Blue 与 machine 同位。

sentences.sentence: This time, the computer triumphed 3 1/2 - 2 1/2.
sentences.translation: 这一次，计算机以3.5比2.5获胜。

structure.text: This time
the computer triumphed 3 1/2 - 2 1/2

difficult_points: triumphed 在此是不及物动词，后面的数字是比赛比分。
3 1/2 - 2 1/2 表示国际象棋六局制比赛的总得分。

sentences.sentence: And they are only getting better.
sentences.translation: 而且计算机只会变得越来越强。

structure.text: they
are only getting better

difficult_points: they 指 chess-playing computers。
现在进行时 getting better 描述持续增强的趋势，only 有“还会继续”的强调意味。

sentences.sentence: As impressive as these results seem, most people agree that it is similar to a forklift beating a weightlifter - somehow not a valid contest, and of little significance.
sentences.translation: 尽管这些结果看起来令人印象深刻，大多数人仍认为这就像叉车击败举重运动员——算不上真正公平有效的较量，也没有多少意义。

structure.text: As impressive as these results seem
most people agree that it is similar to a forklift beating a weightlifter
somehow not a valid contest, and of little significance

difficult_points: As + 形容词 + as 是让步倒装，意为“尽管……”。
a forklift beating a weightlifter 是动名词复合结构，作 similar to 的宾语。
破折号后省略 it is，评价这种胜利的有效性和意义。

sentences.sentence: Yes, computers can win games, but creativity and intelligence are still the province of human players.
sentences.translation: 诚然，计算机能够赢棋，但创造力和智慧仍然是人类棋手的专属领域。

structure.text: computers can win games
but creativity and intelligence are still the province of human players

difficult_points: Yes 在此承认前述事实，为 but 后的限制性观点让步。
the province of 是比喻用法，表示某事物专属或擅长的领域。

sentences.sentence: It is these factors, as well as the tense psychological struggle of minds and the personalities involved, together with the limitless artistry of the positions themselves, which will always make chess such a fascinating game
sentences.translation: 正是这些因素，再加上思维之间紧张的心理较量、参与者的个性以及棋局本身无穷的艺术性，才会使国际象棋始终如此迷人。

structure.text: It is these factors, as well as the tense psychological struggle of minds and the personalities involved, together with the limitless artistry of the positions themselves
which will always make chess such a fascinating game

difficult_points: It is...which... 是强调句，强调使国际象棋迷人的多项因素。
as well as 与 together with 叠加补充心理较量、个性和棋局艺术性。
make chess such a fascinating game 是复合宾语结构；原文无句末标点。

expressions.meaning_zh: 使……成为如此迷人的游戏
